title: cyclosorus sessilipinnus
intro: Cyclosorus sessilipinnus, also known as the creeping cyclosorus or creeping lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus sessilipinnus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, as well as its potential to support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Cyclosorus sessilipinnus is often used in teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
